title: Bridge Essay: An insight-related neural reward signal.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Non-fabrication — spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight.

**An insight-related neural reward signal.**. Neuroimage.. PMID: 32194279. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2020.116757. Moments of insight, aphenomenon of creative cognition in which an idea suddenly emerges into awareness as an "Aha!" are often reported to be affectively positive experiences. We tested the hypothesis that problem-solving by insight is accompanied by neural reward processing. We recorded high-density EEGs while participants solved aseries of anagrams.
